featured.name: Mexitale
featured.description: A modern Mexican restaurant on the Boston Post Road bringing fresh, creative Mexican cuisine to Guilford. Known for its quality ingredients and contemporary take on traditional Mexican dishes.

restaurants.name: Anthony's of Guilford
restaurants.description: A neighborhood Italian restaurant in Guilford serving classic Italian-American dishes. A reliable choice for pasta, chicken parm, and other traditional favorites.

restaurants.name: Ashley's Ice Cream
restaurants.description: A beloved ice cream shop offering handcrafted flavors made with quality ingredients. A must-stop in Guilford during warmer months.

restaurants.name: Belle Vie Cafe
restaurants.description: A charming cafe near the Guilford Green offering lighter fare for daytime visits. A popular spot for coffee, pastries, and casual lunch.

restaurants.name: Bufalina
restaurants.description: A wood-fired Neapolitan pizza restaurant near the Guilford Green serving authentic Italian pies in a stylish setting. Known for its crispy, blistered crusts and fresh toppings.

restaurants.name: Carpanzano's Pizzeria
restaurants.description: A local go-to pizza spot in Guilford serving classic pies and Italian staples. A dependable neighborhood pizzeria for takeout and casual dining.

restaurants.name: Char & Lemon
restaurants.description: An Italian restaurant in Guilford offering a menu that blends Mediterranean flavors with modern touches. Located along Whitfield Street near the town center.

restaurants.name: Chapter One Food & Drink
restaurants.description: A popular American restaurant near the Guilford Green known for its creative menu and lively atmosphere. Draws crowds for both dinner and drinks.

restaurants.name: Cilantro Specialty Foods
restaurants.description: A Mexican specialty foods shop and eatery bringing Latin flavors to Guilford's Whitfield Street area. Offers prepared foods, fresh ingredients, and a taste of authentic Mexican cuisine.

restaurants.name: Country Tavern
restaurants.description: A casual American tavern on the Boston Post Road offering classic pub fare and drinks. A laid-back spot for a relaxed meal in Guilford.

restaurants.name: Dairy Queen
restaurants.description: A fast food chain location in Guilford serving soft-serve ice cream, Blizzards, and quick-service meals. Conveniently located on the Boston Post Road.

restaurants.name: Deke's Bagels
restaurants.description: A fresh-baked bagel shop near the Guilford Green serving a variety of bagels, spreads, and breakfast sandwiches. A go-to morning stop for locals.

restaurants.name: Deli Unlimited
restaurants.description: A neighborhood deli in Guilford offering sandwiches, subs, and prepared foods for takeout. A solid choice for a quick, no-frills lunch.

restaurants.name: Dunkin'
restaurants.description: A familiar coffee and donut chain location on Guilford's Boston Post Road. Open early for coffee, breakfast sandwiches, and baked goods.

restaurants.name: First Garden
restaurants.description: A Chinese restaurant on the Boston Post Road in Guilford serving traditional Chinese-American dishes. Offers takeout and dine-in options.

restaurants.name: Grand Apizza
restaurants.description: A Guilford pizzeria on the Boston Post Road carrying on the proud Connecticut apizza tradition. A local favorite for thin-crust pies and Italian entrees.

restaurants.name: Guilford Bistro & Bar
restaurants.description: An American bistro near the Guilford Green popular for cocktails and elevated pub fare. A go-to spot for a night out in the town center.

restaurants.name: Hen & Heifer
restaurants.description: A popular bakery near Guilford's town center offering freshly baked breads, pastries, and specialty items. A favorite among locals for quality baked goods.

restaurants.name: I Thai
restaurants.description: An authentic Thai restaurant in Guilford serving traditional dishes with fresh ingredients. Located along the Boston Post Road near the town center.

restaurants.name: JAIPORE Xpress
restaurants.description: An Indian restaurant on Whitfield Street bringing flavorful curries, biryanis, and other Indian specialties to the Guilford dining scene. A convenient option for quick and satisfying Indian cuisine.

restaurants.name: Jersey Mike's Subs
restaurants.description: A sub sandwich chain location on the Boston Post Road in Guilford. Known for its fresh-sliced deli meats and made-to-order subs.

restaurants.name: Kamana
restaurants.description: An Indian restaurant near the Guilford Green offering a menu of curries, tandoori dishes, and other South Asian flavors. One of two Indian dining options in town.

restaurants.name: KC's Restaurant and Pub
restaurants.description: A neighborhood favorite on the Boston Post Road for casual American meals in a friendly pub atmosphere. A reliable spot for comfort food and drinks.

restaurants.name: Lorenzo's II
restaurants.description: An Italian restaurant in North Guilford serving Italian-American classics in a more rural setting away from the town center. A local staple for pasta, seafood, and traditional entrees.

restaurants.name: Lucky Thai Kitchen
restaurants.description: A Thai restaurant near the Guilford Green offering a menu of curries, stir-fries, and noodle dishes. A convenient spot for Thai food in the heart of town.

restaurants.name: McDonald's
restaurants.description: A fast food chain location on the Boston Post Road in Guilford. Open for breakfast, lunch, and dinner with the familiar McDonald's menu.

restaurants.name: Mexitale
restaurants.description: A modern Mexican restaurant on the Boston Post Road bringing fresh, creative Mexican cuisine to Guilford. Known for its quality ingredients and contemporary take on traditional Mexican dishes.

restaurants.name: Moon Shots Juice Co.
restaurants.description: A health-focused juice bar and cafe near the Guilford Green offering fresh-pressed juices, smoothies, and light fare. A popular daytime stop for a healthy boost.

restaurants.name: Mooyah Burgers
restaurants.description: A build-your-own burger spot on the Boston Post Road in Guilford serving hand-crafted burgers, fries, and shakes. A step up from typical fast food burgers.

restaurants.name: Mr. J Asian Bistro
restaurants.description: An Asian fusion restaurant on the Boston Post Road covering a range of Asian cuisines including Chinese, Japanese, and Thai-inspired dishes. A versatile option for Asian food in Guilford.

restaurants.name: Naples Restaurant & Pizza
restaurants.description: An Italian restaurant and pizzeria on the Boston Post Road in Guilford serving pizza, pasta, and classic Italian entrees. A longstanding local option for reliable Italian-American dining.

restaurants.name: New Star
restaurants.description: A Chinese restaurant in Guilford offering a menu of traditional Chinese-American dishes for dine-in and takeout. Located along the Boston Post Road.

restaurants.name: Pa's Place
restaurants.description: A classic American diner in south Guilford serving hearty breakfast and lunch fare. A no-frills spot for homestyle cooking and generous portions.

restaurants.name: Panera Bread
restaurants.description: A fast-casual bakery-cafe on the Boston Post Road offering soups, salads, sandwiches, and fresh-baked bread. A reliable option for a quick, sit-down lunch.

restaurants.name: Pasta Avest & Pizzeria
restaurants.description: An Italian restaurant and pizzeria on the Boston Post Road serving pasta dishes, pizza, and Italian-American favorites. A neighborhood spot for family-friendly Italian dining.

restaurants.name: Playa Bowls
restaurants.description: A health-conscious fast-casual spot on the Boston Post Road serving acai bowls, smoothies, and fresh juices. A popular option for a light and energizing meal.

restaurants.name: Pokemoto
restaurants.description: A poke bowl restaurant near the Guilford Green offering customizable bowls with fresh fish and toppings. A healthy, quick-service dining option in the town center.

restaurants.name: Prime on Whitfield
restaurants.description: An upscale steakhouse on Whitfield Street in Guilford serving prime cuts, seafood, and craft cocktails. One of Guilford's top fine dining destinations.

restaurants.name: Quattro's
restaurants.description: A classic Italian-American restaurant near Guilford's town center offering traditional pasta, seafood, and meat dishes. A well-established choice for Italian dining in Guilford.

restaurants.name: Sheppard's Tavern
restaurants.description: A bar and tavern near Guilford's town center offering drinks and casual fare. A relaxed spot for an evening out near the Green.

restaurants.name: Shoreline Diner
restaurants.description: A classic American diner on the Boston Post Road in Guilford serving breakfast, lunch, and dinner. Known for its traditional diner fare and welcoming atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Som Siam
restaurants.description: An authentic Thai restaurant on Whitfield Street near the Guilford Green serving traditional Thai dishes. One of Guilford's longstanding options for Thai cuisine.

restaurants.name: South Lane Bistro
restaurants.description: An upscale American bistro near the Guilford Green offering refined seasonal fare. A go-to destination for a special dinner in the town center.

restaurants.name: Starbucks
restaurants.description: A coffee chain location on the Boston Post Road in Guilford. Offers the full Starbucks menu of coffee drinks, teas, and snacks.

restaurants.name: Subway
restaurants.description: A sandwich chain location on the Boston Post Road in Guilford. Serves made-to-order subs, wraps, and salads for a quick meal.

restaurants.name: The Brownstone
restaurants.description: An upscale American restaurant near the Guilford Green known for refined dining in a warm atmosphere. A popular choice for a special night out in the town center.

restaurants.name: The Greenery
restaurants.description: An American restaurant near the Guilford Green with a menu focused on fresh, wholesome fare. A pleasant spot for lunch or a casual dinner.

restaurants.name: The Place
restaurants.description: A legendary BYOB outdoor seafood restaurant on Route 1 where clams, lobsters, corn, and bluefish are roasted over an open fire pit on tree stumps. Open seasonally, it's a bucket-list experience for Connecticut food lovers.

restaurants.name: The Whole Enchilada
restaurants.description: A Mexican restaurant on the Boston Post Road offering burritos, enchiladas, and other south-of-the-border favorites. A casual, affordable option for Mexican food in Guilford.

restaurants.name: Three Girls Vegan
restaurants.description: An entirely plant-based restaurant in Guilford offering creative vegan dishes, a rarity on the Connecticut shoreline. A destination for vegans and anyone curious about meat-free dining.

restaurants.name: Wendy's
restaurants.description: A fast food chain location on the Boston Post Road in Guilford. Serves burgers, chicken sandwiches, fries, and Frosty desserts.
